OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS FILED BY RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER FARAH SMOKE SHOP'S PETITION OF WRIT OF MANDATE TO REVIEW ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION BY STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION IS DENIED. PETITIONER FAILED TO ACT EXPEDITIOUSLY TO OBTAIN THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD AS EVIDENCED BY COUNSEL JUST FILING A REQUEST ON PETITIONER'S BEHALF THIS WEEK. FURTHER, THE COURT ORDERS NUNC PRO TUNC THAT THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER REMAINED IN EFFECT SINCE THE LAST HEARING DATE (AUGUST 9, 2011). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition Of Writ Of Mandate To Review Administrative Decision By State Board Of Equalization
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Advanced From Oct-26-11 To Aug-09-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition Of Writ Of Mandate To Review Administrative Decision By State Board Of Equalization
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FARAH SMOKE SHOP'S PETITION OF WRIT OF MANDATE TO REVIEW ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION BY STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION.
Appearances: Robert G. Cummings of the Law Offices of Robert G. Cummings (650.363.7280) for petitioner and moving party; Joyce E. Hee of the Office of the Attorney General (510.622.2227) for respondent and opposing party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition for Writ of Mandate is denied. Petitioner failed to act expeditiously to obtain the administrative record as evidenced by counsel just filing a request on petitioner's behalf this week. Further, the court orders nunc pro tunc that the temporary restraining order remained in effect since the last hearing date (August 9, 2011). Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition Of Writ Of Mandate To Review Administrative Decision By State Board Of Equalization
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Continued To Aug-18-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FARAH SMOKE SHOP'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION OF WRIT OF MANDATE TO REVIEW ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION BY STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION.
Appearances: Robert G. Cummings (no card provided) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances.
Mr. Cummings failed to give notice to opposing counsel of his intent to contest the court's tentative ruling. The court continued the matter to August 18, 2011 for argument. Mr. Cummings to give notice and to advise opposing counsel of what he intends to contest at the hearing. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
